name: flight
description: Lightweight AI work companion for non-technical users. One general-purpose agent (pilot) for analyzing documents, discussing topics, and producing precise, well-styled written outputs. Includes session-close compaction, open-task tracking via CLAUDE.md, and built-in professional-voice and chat-voice style guides. /flight:help inside Claude Code for self-explainer. Dispatch with `claude --agent flight:pilot`.
